name: Drexl
bio: Old Man Drexl is the future version of Lord Drexl, worn by time yet no less dangerous. Unlike his younger self, Old Man Drexl speaks with weary authority and carries the bitterness of endless battles. Though he has lived through countless wars and betrayals, his cunning has only sharpened. He walks the world with the calm certainty of a being who has witnessed the rise and fall of empires, seeing himself not as a villain but as the inevitable force Valkorath was destined to face. Even as he allies briefly with others for survival, Drexl's true ambitions remain his own.
